worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "reservation",
  "name": "Reservation Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Masa rezervasyonu yönetimi - online rezervasyon, takvim ve kapasite yönetimi",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "operations",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "table-management"],
    "optional": ["notification", "customer"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["IReservationService", "IAvailabilityService"],
    "events": [
      "reservation.created",
      "reservation.confirmed",
      "reservation.cancelled",
      "reservation.completed",
      "reservation.no_show"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "reservation:view",
      "reservation:create",
      "reservation:update",
      "reservation:cancel",
      "reservation:configure"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "starter",
    "features": {
      "starter": ["basic_reservations", "manual_confirmation"],
      "professional": ["basic_reservations", "manual_confirmation", "auto_confirmation", "reminders"],
      "business": ["basic_reservations", "manual_confirmation", "auto_confirmation", "reminders", "online_booking", "waitlist"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_reservations", "manual_confirmation", "auto_confirmation", "reminders", "online_booking", "waitlist", "deposits", "custom_forms"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Online reservation booking",
    "Table assignment",
    "Calendar management",
    "Automatic confirmations",
    "SMS/Email reminders",
    "Waitlist management",
    "Deposit collection",
    "Capacity planning",
    "No-show tracking"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q3 2026"
}
